name: Mozaik Ludila
description: Postavljaj oblikovane fragmente pločica na 8×8 rešetku i briši redove, kolone i 2×2 kvadrante iste boje da dostigneš 2500 poena.

modules.src/main.js: Bootstrap, requestAnimationFrame petlja, canvas resize sa devicePixelRatio, layout kalkukacija (cellSize, gridOffsetX/Y), state init, save timer
modules.src/config.js: Sve tuning konstante — grid dimenzije, TILE_COLORS (5 boja), BG_COLOR, GROUT_COLOR, SCORE_WIN=2500, combo multiplieri, particle parametri, animacioni tajmeri, PHASE_POOLS za weighted shape selection
modules.src/state.js: GameState shape (grid 8×8, score, combo, fragmentQueue, particles, animations, stats), save/load/reset u localStorage, saveHighScore/loadHighScore odvojeno
modules.src/input.js: Mouse + touch + keyboard handleri, klik-za-selekciju model, ghost hover update, postavljanje fragmenta + match evaluacija + score u jednom handler-u, R=rotacija, Escape=deselect
modules.src/render.js: Sve canvas draw pozivi — grid background, popunjene ćelije sa highlight, ghost preview (validna/nevalidna boja), match flash treperanje, fragment zona (aktivan+peek), partikle, HUD progress bar, combo pulse overlay, win/gameover overlay
modules.src/ui.js: initUI (skloni legacy DOM), handleRestartClick, isRestartButtonClick helper za overlay dugmad
modules.src/entities/fragments.js: SHAPES const sa kompletnim rotacijama za 10 oblika (Single, I2, I3, I4, L, J, T, S, Z, O), pickRandomShape(score) sa weighted pool po fazama, pickRandomColor(), createFragment(), initFragmentQueue(), enqueueNewFragment()
modules.src/systems/matching.js: evaluateMatches(grid) — SET logika za redove, kolone i 2×2 kvadrante; matchedSetToArray(), clearMatchedCells(); vraća {matched: Set, perfects: {rows,cols,quads}}
modules.src/systems/scoring.js: applyScore(state, matchedCount, perfects, placedTileCount) — placement_bonus + (base_match + perfect_bonuses) × combo_multiplier; combo management; win trigger; getWinProgress()
modules.src/systems/placement.js: isValidPlacement(grid, shapeId, rotIndex, row, col), placeFragment() koja muta grid, checkGameOver(grid, activeFragment) O(rotations×64×cells), getFragmentCells() za ghost render
modules.src/systems/index.js: Re-eksportuje sve sisteme za lak import; placeholder za buduće sisteme u update petlji
modules.src/audio.js: Web Audio API zvučni efekti — placement klik (keramika), match ding akord, combo fanfare, invalid bump, win crescendo; initAudio() aktivira AudioContext na prvi user gesture
modules.src/particles.js: spawnParticles(particles, cx, cy, color, count) — generiše čestice sa random uglom+brzinom; drawParticles(ctx, particles) — linear fade opacity
modules.styles/base.css: Layout, full-screen canvas, touch-action: none, font-family serif, body background
modules.styles/ui.css: HUD dizajn — score bar, combo badge, fragment zona stilovi
modules.styles/game.css: Animacione klase — shake, match flash, combo pulse overlay
